utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hi .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Hey . Soaps ? Shampoos ? Are you really taking all this stuff ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_Soaps ? Shampoos ? Are you really taking all this stuff ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Why not ? It is built into the price of the room .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yeah but you do not need ... What is this ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Thread !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Score ! Where are the disposable cameras ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: What disposable cameras ?

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: The cameras ? Remember last night I told you to take them ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No you did not .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Yes ! Remember ? Right before we cut the cake , I went up to you and I said

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh ... oh yeah , you ... you came up to me and asked if I could do you a favor , and my Uncle Murray came up to you and handed you a check .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: And then you said , " Why do they call it a check ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Why not a Yugoslavian ? "

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah , then you did that .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: So you do not have the cameras ? !

emotion_cause.span: 15_So you do not have the cameras ? !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: No . Sorry man .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: So ? What ? What ? They are gone ! Monica gonna freak !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well , I am sure they are still somewhere here in the hotel . I will ... I will help you look for them .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Great .

emotion_cause.span: 18_I am sure they are still somewhere here in the hotel . I will ... I will help you look for them .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: In ... in three minutes .
